title: Replanted Roses
description: Brings roses back into the game!
body:
Information
---
I want roses in my game

you want roses in your game

I happen to know a thing or two about texturing

everyone wins

Versions
---
This should work in 1.14 to current, maybe 1.13 but I made the textures to fit the Jappa style

I do have plans for 1.0-1.13 support as well, so don't worry if you play on earlier versions (:

Languages
---
This pack is supposed to change the name of the flowers as well, but I only have the en_US file in my directory

If you want me to add support for your language, make a request on the Github issue tracker and I'll get it taken care of (:

Have issues or a suggestion?
---
Report it on the Github issue tracker so I know I need to fix something :D

This tweak not for you?
---
Check out my other projects, I might have something you didn't know you needed! :D
